infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: We need access to your contacts to sync client information.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We use your location to detect when you arrive at a client's address.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to detect when you arrive at a client's address.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: We record visit conversations to automatically fill CRM data.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Field Sales CRM to use your location to detect arrival at client sites.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Field Sales CRM to record visit conversations.
